---
name: Privacy or security report
about: Report a privacy leak, signing/auth bypass, or other security issue
title: "[security] "
labels: ["security", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

**Please do not file public security issues here.** Follow
[SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) and open a
GitHub Security Advisory instead. This template exists only so the public
tracker is not the default channel.

If you accidentally pasted details into a public issue, edit it to remove the
sensitive parts and let a maintainer know so we can rotate any exposed
material.
